---
name: Pull Request
about: Propose changes to the codebase

---

## Description

<!-- Provide a clear and concise summary of the changes. Reference any related issues
using the `#issue_number` syntax. -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Check the box that applies by replacing `[ ]` with `[x]`. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring / code cleanup
- [ ] Build / tooling / CI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Translation / language

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe the steps you took to verify the changes. Include relevant information
about your test environment (OS, Java version, browser, etc.). -->

## Screenshots

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the changes. Delete this section
if not needed. -->

## Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are complete before requesting a review. -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style and conventions (see `docs/development.md#code--naming-conventions` and `AGENTS.md#key-conventions`)
- [ ] The build runs successfully (`./mvnw clean install`)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`AGENTS.md`, `README.md`, `docs/`, `DATABASE.md`, etc.) if needed
- [ ] The commit messages follow the project's convention (50-char subject, 72-char body wrap)
